description: A designed graphic with a 'THE DAILY SIGNAL' logo at the top and a headline reading 'The Big Beautiful Reason Americans Are Getting Larger Tax Refunds This Filing Season', with part of the headline highlighted in yellow. Below is a color photograph of a man with white-gray hair in a dark suit and gold tie walking through a doorway in a White House interior, smiling and carrying a folder. A White House wordmark is at lower left.
notable_text: THE DAILY SIGNAL; The 'Big Beautiful' Reason Americans Are Getting Larger Tax Refunds This Filing Season; THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON
